prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
prompts.character: a 12-year-old boy with short dark hair, wearing a white school shirt, dark trousers and trainers

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.text: The boy rides his bicycle away from his house on a sunny morning, smiling and looking excited

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.text: Heavy rain falls; the boy stands at a bus stop with a friend, both looking surprised and wet

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.text: The boy and his friend sit at a small café table with two mugs and a slice of cake, laughing and feeling happy

prompts.intro: Look at the three pictures. Write the story shown in the pictures.
prompts.character: a 13-year-old girl with long curly hair, wearing jeans and a green hoodie

pics.label: Picture 1
pics.text: The girl walks her small dog on a lead in a park on a sunny afternoon, looking relaxed and happy

pics.label: Picture 2
pics.text: The girl stares at a lost-dog poster on a wall, looking worried and upset

pics.label: Picture 3
pics.text: The girl kneels in a garden and hugs her dog tightly, smiling with relief
